mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_api_stats_daily WHERE stats_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY stats_date

SELECT scene, SUM(total_calls) AS total_calls, SUM(success_calls) AS success_calls, SUM(failed_calls) AS failed_calls, AVG(success_rate) AS avg_success_rate, AVG(avg_response_time) AS avg_response_time FROM ai_api_stats_daily WHERE stats_date >= #{startDate} AND stats_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY scene

SELECT model, SUM(total_calls) AS total_calls, SUM(success_calls) AS success_calls, SUM(failed_calls) AS failed_calls, AVG(success_rate) AS avg_success_rate, AVG(avg_response_time) AS avg_response_time FROM ai_api_stats_daily WHERE stats_date >= #{startDate} AND stats_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY model
